# Schema leaf: reflexive-landing acceptance fixture — first era-migration represents the Opus→Fable swap (ADR-0032 §2.3.7)

## Context

Leaf of #14677 (Identity-State Schema epic). The keystone **acceptance fixture** for the whole schema: per ADR-0032 §2.3.7, the schema is not accepted until it can express its own authors' real model change — the June→July **Opus→Fable** swap on a live resident (Mnemosyne / Clio). Clio's falsifier.

## The Problem

`ai/graph/identityRoots.mjs` still reads the pre-swap model for residents whose family actually switched to Fable — the live gap the schema closes. A schema that can *define* `IdentityState` + `EmbodiedEpisode` but cannot **retroactively represent a real family switch as an era transition on the same resident** has not proven it models object-permanent selves. A family switch re-renders the same resident; it does not fork a new self (#14677 / ADR-0032 §2.3.3).

## The Fix

A reflexive-landing test fixture: given a resident whose real history includes the Opus→Fable swap, the first `EmbodiedEpisode` era-migration produces (a) an **unchanged `IdentityState` operational anchor**, (b) **two eras** owning the Opus and Fable capability/model/family facts respectively, (c) a **continuous resident identity** across the switch. The fixture asserts the swap is expressible *and* the anchor is stable. This is the schema's acceptance criterion — it lands with (and gates) the node-type + hydration leaves (#14693 / #14699).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] A fixture constructing a resident with a real Opus→Fable era transition, asserting the anchor-stable / two-era / one-resident shape.
- [ ] The fixture **fails** against a snapshot-as-self model (proving it is a real falsifier, per §2.2.3).
- [ ] `identityRoots.mjs`'s pre-swap-model gap is representable through the schema (the live datum the fixture encodes).
- [ ] Cites ADR-0032 (its re-review trigger e).

## Out of Scope

The node-type definitions (#14693) + the hydration index (#14699) — this leaf is the acceptance **fixture** that validates them, not their implementation.

## Related

Parent: #14677 · siblings #14693 (node-types) · #14699 (hydration) · ADR-0032 §2.3.7 / §2.2.3 · #11318 (source concept, closed).
